result.answer:
Jony Ive is currently the founder of LoveFrom, a creative collective he established in 2019, based in San Francisco, California. As of 2025-2026, he is also leading design efforts at OpenAI, working on AI hardware and technology, following his merger with OpenAI's io project in 2025, which was valued at $6.5 billion ([Britannica](https://www.britannica.com/biography/Jony-Ive); [LoveFrom Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/LoveFrom); [Monocle](https://monocle.com/business/can-jony-ive-save-san-francisco-interview); [Business Standard](https://www.business-standard.com/technology/tech-news/who-is-jony-ive-apple-former-designer-chief-sam-altman-openai-125052700911_1.html)). 

Ive's role at LoveFrom involves collaborating with high-profile clients such as Ferrari, Airbnb, and others, while his partnership with OpenAI focuses on AI hardware development, aiming to revolutionize artificial intelligence interfaces. His biography highlights his influential career at Apple, where he designed iconic products like the iPhone, iPod, and MacBook, before founding LoveFrom and joining OpenAI ([Britannica](https://www.britannica.com/biography/Jony-Ive); [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jony_Ive)). 

Regarding his education and family, detailed personal information such as specific educational background or family details is not provided in the search results. However, he was born in London in 1967 and holds British-American nationality ([Britannica](https://www.britannica.com/biography/Jony-Ive); [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jony_Ive)).
